title: Pancakes
excerpt: Pancakes can be enjoyed sweet or savoury. For winter it's a must. Pancakes 2 (500ml) cups flour 2 teaspoons (10ml) baking powder 1 teaspoon (5ml) salt 2 cups (500ml) water 2 eggs 1/2 cup (125ml) oil 1 teaspoon (5ml) lemon juice Mix everything together with a whisk. Let it stand for …
html:
Pancakes can be enjoyed sweet or savoury. For winter it's a must.

Pancakes

2 (500ml) cups flour

2 teaspoons (10ml) baking powder

1 teaspoon (5ml) salt

2 cups (500ml) water

2 eggs

1/2 cup (125ml) oil

1 teaspoon (5ml) lemon juice

Whisk everything together with a wire whisk. Let it stand for 1 hour.

Pour 10 ml oil into your pan. Let your pan get nice and hot, then pour the oil out.

Pour a thin layer of your batter into the pan. When it starts bubbling and gets dry, turn it over with a spatula.

Stack the pancakes on top of each other, keep them covered with foil or a bowl with a lid.

Photo from: http://deliciouskenya.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/48/2017/10/crepes-for-breakfast.jpg

 

 

There are your pancakes!

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

For the filling you can now use your free rein:

cream

caramel

berries

chocolate spread

nuts

bananas

cheese

spinach

ham

tuna with mayonnaise
